heading: General management plan
label: 410yy–5 General management plan
text: Not later than 3 fiscal years after , the Secretary shall prepare, in consultation with the Commission, and submit to Congress a general management plan for the park containing the information described in . Such plan shall interpret the technological and social history of the area, and the industrial complexes of the Calumet and Hecla, and Quincy Mining Companies, with equal emphasis.October 27, 1992section 100502 of title 54
